Name: Level5 Tape Jam Remover Tool
Short description: Generally speaking, jams will most frequently occur when the cutter blade returns to its retracted position after use. Small pieces of cut tape may catch on the blade after repeated cutting, causing a small obstruction within the left hand side of the taper head (when the head is facing you).
Description:
Generally speaking, jams will most frequently occur when the cutter blade returns to its retracted position after use. Small pieces of cut tape may catch on the blade after repeated cutting, causing a small obstruction within the left hand side of the taper head (when the head is facing you).

A Tape Jam Remover is a flat and narrow steel tool that is designed to slide easily into the taper feeder slot. Its design gives you a precise feel for the position of the blockage and lets you efficiently dislodge it.

It is important to clean the automatic taper properly after each use so that particles of tape or mud do not have a chance to dry in the head. For cleaning instructions and maintenance tips check out this helpful video:

HOW TO USE A TAPE JAM REMOVER TOOL

Don’t let a tape jam slow you down on the job site. Follow the steps listed below to quickly eliminate a jam and keep your taper moving.

  1. First remove any tape that is currently in the feeder.
  2. Then, raise the control sleeve of the auto taper to move the advancing needle out of the way so that it doesn’t impede the movement of the Tape Jam Remover tool.
  3. Next, with the control needle out of the way, gently slide the Tape Jam Remover tool into the tape feeder slot. The aim is to move the tool all the way up through the taper feeder slot mimicking the movement of tape through the auto taper.
  4. Then, for the most effective release of the jam, shift the Tape Jam Remover tool from left to right to “feel” for the blockage.
  5. In many cases, the jam will be closest to the retracted position of the cutting blade, in the left side corner of the taper when the taper head is facing you.
  6. Once you have evacuated the jam, you are ready to use the taper again.

TOOL MAINTENANCE & STORAGE

It is important to clean your tools and accessories immediately after each use. Follow these steps to keep your LEVEL5 tape jam remover tool looking and performing like new.

  1. Run warm water over the Tape Jam Remover tool to soften any joint compound that may still be present. Use a brush or sponge with soft bristles to remove any debris or mud. Do not use wire brushes or other harsh abrasives
  2. For a deeper clean, a mild detergent or dish soap can be used with warm water. Rinse the tool thoroughly in warm water, then pat it dry with a soft towel.
  3. After cleaning, store the tool in a dry area.

Short description: Use this LEVEL5 Curved Drywall Trowel for smoothing and finishing drywall joint compound, plaster, EIFS, stucco, and more. Its brushed leather composite handle molds to the user's hand over time and its surface-welded rivets ensure it can stand up to the toughest of work environments.
Description:
Use this LEVEL5 Curved Drywall Trowel for smoothing and finishing drywall joint compound, plaster, EIFS, stucco, and more. Its brushed leather composite handle molds to the user's hand over time and its surface-welded rivets ensure it can stand up to the toughest of work environments.

Finishers rely on LEVEL5 Curved Drywall Trowels for smoothing and finishing drywall compound, plaster, EIFS, stucco, and more. Their 1.8" convex curved blade is designed for finessing seams and enabling compound breathability during intermediate coats. Thanks to their precision-ground edges and corners, they're ready to go right out of the box.

Features

  • 1.8" convex curve to the blade for finessing seams.
  • Curved bladed enables compound breathability during intermediate coats.
  • Triple-hardened premium stainless steel construction.
  • Brushed leather handle will custom form to user's hand.
  • High-strength but lightweight aluminum handle mount.
  • High-impact composite handle core for strength and durability.
  • Super-strong surface-mounted rivets that last longer than "through-rivet" designs.
  • Precision-ground, pre-broke edges and corners.
  • 0.7mm Blade

Name: Level5 Triple Hardened Rigid Flat Golden Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel
Short description: LEVEL5 offers a full line of finishing trowels that are manufactured under a proprietary innovative design and strict quality manufacturing requirements in Europe. These hand trowels offer the finisher some outstanding features, including:
Description:
LEVEL5 offers a full line of finishing trowels that are manufactured under a proprietary innovative design and strict quality manufacturing requirements in Europe. These hand trowels offer the finisher some outstanding features, including:

  • Precision powder-coated aluminum handle mount that is rigid yet lightweight and durable.
  • Robotically welded super-strong surface-mounted rivets that last longer than typical "through-rivet" designs.
  • Premium grade, European hardened stainless steel blades
  • Patented Leather Composite Handles

LEVEL5 Trowels feature an ergonomic handle with a high impact composite core that has been overmolded with a brushed leather composite. This handle offers superior comfort, does not get slippery when wet, and is far more durable than traditional wound leather handles. The shape and position of the handle relative to the tang/blade mount ensures reduced fatigue during use. The handle height also provides adequate clearance from the blade tang so even those with larger hands can use this trowel with comfort.

Rigid Flat Trowels

LEVEL5 Standard Rigid Trowels feature 0.7mm triple hardened gold stainless steel. This rigid blade design is ideal for drywall joint compound; plaster; EIFS; stucco, etc.

With precision ground edges and corners, LEVEL5 Standard Trowels are pre-broke for an ideal feel right out of the box!

The blade on LEVEL5 Standard Trowels is mounted to a precision cast handle mount (tang) with strong, stainless steel surface welded rivets. This attachment method is far superior to typical "through-rivet" designs and is guaranteed to stand up to the most severe work environments.

Features Include

  • Triple-hardened premium stainless steel.
  • Precision-ground, pre-broke edges and corners. These hand trowels are ready to go right out of the box.
  • High strength but lightweight aluminum handle mount.
  • Super-strong surface-mounted rivets that last longer than “through-rivet” designs.
  • High impact composite handle core for strength and durability.
  • Handle overmolded with proprietary brushed leather injected composite. The handle will custom form to the user's hand under regular use for maximum comfort.
  • 5 lengths available: 11.5", 12", 14", 16" and, 18"
